title: Ketika Kanvas Berbisik Lagi
theme: Menjelajahi kenangan masa lalu melalui peninggalan seni, menemukan kembali makna hubungan yang pernah ada, dan menerima perubahan dalam hidup dengan tenang.

cover.prompt: A tranquil city street scene featuring an old, sturdy art gallery building with textured stone walls, set against a sky painted in soft gray and warm, gentle lighting. In the foreground, modern abstract paintings with bold colors and intriguing textures are visible through large windows, inviting curiosity. The atmosphere exudes calmness and quiet elegance, with subtle reflections on wet pavement and a sense of timelessness.
cover.style: Moody atmospheric illustration, soft lighting, painterly style

meta.plan_summary: A photographer, Aria, visits an old art gallery and is drawn to a contemporary abstract painting. It triggers powerful memories of a past love and unarticulated regrets. Discovering a hidden note on the painting's frame, he finds a subtle connection to that person. This leads him to a peaceful acceptance of life's changes and the enduring nature of love and memories, without needing direct confrontation.
